name: Crypto Price MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for real-time cryptocurrency price data using CoinGecko API. Enables AI agents to query current and historical prices for Bitcoin, Ethereum, and thousands of altcoins, track market cap rankings, monitor price changes, and access crypto market data for trading analysis and portfolio tracking workflows.
use_cases: Querying real-time cryptocurrency prices from trading assistant and portfolio tracking agents
Monitoring price changes and market cap rankings for crypto research agents
Accessing historical price data for backtesting and analysis by AI finance agents
Building crypto price alert and portfolio valuation workflows via AI agents
not_for: High-frequency trading (CoinGecko free tier has rate limits)
On-chain DeFi data (CoinGecko is price aggregation, not on-chain data)
best_when: A crypto investor or developer wants AI agents to track cryptocurrency prices, monitor market data, and build portfolio analysis workflows using CoinGecko's comprehensive market data.
avoid_when: You need high-frequency trading data or on-chain DeFi analytics. Free CoinGecko tier has rate limits that constrain automated monitoring.

auth.notes: CoinGecko API key optional for free tier (Demo API). API key required for Pro API with higher rate limits.

pricing.paid_tiers: CoinGecko Pro: higher rate limits and premium endpoints
pricing.notes: CoinGecko Demo API is free with registration. MCP server is free open source.

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Crypto price data used for trading decisions — verify data quality before acting
CoinGecko free tier: 30 req/min limit — monitor closely for portfolio tracking use cases
CoinGecko coin IDs differ from ticker symbols — use CoinGecko IDs (e.g., 'bitcoin' not 'BTC')
Price data has seconds-level delay — not suitable for millisecond-precision trading
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Price data used for financial decisions. API key optional but recommended for stability. HTTPS. No personal financial data — only public market prices.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public market data. Financial decision risk. HTTPS. API key protects rate limits.
